---
title: "CCDE Written"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort: "order asc"
---
```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }
</style>
```


My study notes during the CCDE Written exam.

## Reference

Zsiga, Z. (2023). *Cisco Certified Design Expert: CCDE 400-007 official cert guide*. Cisco Press. ISBN 978-0-13-760104-2. [https://www.ciscopress.com/store/cisco-certified-design-expert-ccde-400-007-official-9780137600878](https://www.ciscopress.com/store/cisco-certified-design-expert-ccde-400-007-official-9780137600878)

## Topics
